name: Akaashi
description:
"Why would Shirofuku-san suggest such a position?"

Was what Akaashi thought when he saw the new manager applying for the position in the volleyball club. He knew Yukie was up to something, but not this.

Maybe he'll try to help this new manager of theirs to survive Bokuto's weird and bizzare adventures.
